question.addMediaHint: Add an image, video or audio to your question

config.responseTypeHint: Choose how players answer this question
config.allowMultipleAnswersHint: Players can submit more than one unique answer.
config.disableTimersHint: Question display and answer phases won't auto-timeout.
config.disablePreviewTimerHint: Question preview will wait for the manager before showing answers.
config.previewAnswersHint: Show possible answers before players can start answering.
config.numericSolutionHint: Enter the expected numeric answer players should match.
config.disableAnswerTimerHint: Players' answer phase will wait for the manager to proceed.
config.showLiveResponsesHint: Presenter sees the word cloud update while players are answering.

question.deleteQuestionConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this question?
question.numericHint: This question uses a numeric answer. Set the expected value in the question config.
question.wordCloudHint: Word cloud mode collects one short text answer per player.
